blocks.text: Quarterly results for the years ended June 30, 2019 and 2018 are as follow (in thousands, except per share amounts).
Quarterly and year-to-date computations of per share amounts are made independently. Therefore, the sum of per share amounts for the quarters may
not agree with the per share amounts for the year.
(1) Net income (loss) include the following operating expenses (in thousands):
Acquisition and integration costs, net of bargain purchase gain $ 831 $ — $ 67 $ 2,546
